rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0003
rows.name:
This is General Vandham, commander of
the New Los Angeles Defense Force![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0005
rows.name: Did we have one of those?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0006
rows.name:
It's to lend him authority when
negotiating with the Growth forces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0007
rows.name:
He probably thought it sounded more impressive
than commander of a civilian organization.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_SEL0011
rows.name: Nod at how oddly fitting it sounds.

rows.label: xs08060100_SEL0021
rows.name: Smile wryly; it does not quite click.

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Something about that buff look of his
feels kind of General-like, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0011
rows.name:
Regardless of the title, there's no
doubting his ability as a commander.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0012
rows.name:
Commander or General, either
one is fine, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs08060100_MSG0013
rows.name:
I can't get the image of him as
"General" out of my head now.[ST:wait ]
